title: Azumanga Girls
description: Adds some content from anime Azumanga Daioh: music discs, main girls, sata andagi and more...
body:
With this mod you can find characters from anime Azumanga Daioh in your minecraft world.

Osaka spawns everywhere in overworld. You can share sata andagi with her.

Other girls can be found in cherry grove, carriing music discs. You can swap discs from them. No need for violence.
Have fun!

Thanks to Noaholic for creating textures for girls!

This mod made with MCreate and Blockbench!

Мод поддерживает русский язык!
The mod supports English!
